mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, real_name, phone, id_card, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, 0, 1)
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM user WHERE role = 0
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard} WHERE id = #{id}
